overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a nighttime ascent through the Akropolis Sanctuary. The player character walks up ancient stone stairways and ramps, passing monumental Greek architecture and torch-lit braziers, eventually reaching an upper terrace with a ceremonial canopy and distant mountain views.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone ramp ascending sanctuary hillside

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the stone ramp flanked by retaining walls, approaching a monumental statue illuminated by torchlight

entered.detail: wide stone-paved ramp with scattered flower petals
tall stone retaining wall with rough-hewn blocks
stone wall with vegetation growing on top
lit fire bowl atop the ramp emitting orange light
large classical statue on pedestal visible at ramp summit

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a steady ascent up a stone ramp within an ancient Greek sanctuary at night. The path is flanked by high stone walls and illuminated by braziers. A monumental statue looms ahead at the top of the incline against a dark blue night sky.

events.description: passing close to a lit stone brazier on the left, increasing warm light on the scene

agents.ego_description: continuing the ascent as the monumental statue grows larger, revealing architectural details of the sanctuary

entered.detail: flight of stone steps branching off the main ramp
secondary staircase ascending parallel to main path
tall dark evergreen tree silhouetted against sky

segments.scene_description: The camera continues ascending, revealing side staircases branching off the main ramp. The monumental statue dominates the view ahead, while a tall cypress tree appears on the right. The camera passes a burning brazier, casting flickering orange light on the stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper sanctuary terrace with ceremonial canopy and mountain vista

events.description: reaching the top of the stairs and entering the open terrace area with panoramic mountain views

agents.ego_description: walking across the upper terrace toward two robed figures, taking in the open vista of snow-capped mountains

notable_agents.action: two robed figures walking slowly ahead toward the terrace edge

entered.detail: large fabric canopy suspended between poles with decorative fringe
massive ceramic vase on stone pedestal
snow-capped mountains visible in the distance under night sky

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges onto a wide open terrace beneath a ceremonial canopy. Two robed NPCs walk ahead toward the edge where snow-capped mountains are visible in the distance. The space opens dramatically from the enclosed stairway to a panoramic vista, with a large decorative urn positioned on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent through a torch-lit ancient sanctuary that transforms from a narrow stone corridor into a wide, panoramic terrace. It begins with a steady climb up a stone ramp flanked by high walls, moving toward a monumental statue that looms against a dark blue night sky. As the camera continues upward, the path opens to reveal branching staircases and a tall cypress tree, passing a burning brazier that casts flickering orange light across the masonry. The scene then expands dramatically as the camera emerges from the enclosed incline onto a wide open terrace beneath a ceremonial canopy. Finally, the view opens to a distant vista of snow-capped mountains, passing a large decorative urn and robed figures walking toward the edge of the sanctuary.
